title: Project Metadata, Resources, PyInstaller, and Platform Builds
description: A one-file artifact is copied across operating systems, Tcl/Tk data is assumed present, assets depend on the working directory, and only the build machine launches it. Learners cumulatively produce platform-native signed-off release artifact matrix through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define package layout, metadata, Python requirement, dependencies, console or GUI entry point, and import-safe startup.
Load licensed package resources without assuming source checkout or current working directory layout.
Inspect PyInstaller analysis, tkinter hooks, Tcl/Tk libraries and data, hidden imports, warnings, and artifact contents.
